title: vitis vitacea var. laciniata
intro: Vitis vitacea var. laciniata, also known as cut-leaf grape or laciniata grape, is a variety of the Vitis vitacea species, a type of grapevine native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Vitis vitacea var. laciniata include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
